title: Dedicated Freight Corridor is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dedicated Freight Corridor is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dedicated Freight Corridor family as a Warehouse Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dedicated Freight Corridor:
Dedicated Freight Corridor is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dedicated Freight Corridor!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
